name: nexus
description: Local AI Cowork metabrain. Exposes The Ledger, Thought Stack, Decision Guard, Session Plan, and Compass dashboard as native MCP tools so every Claude instance can access shared cognitive state.
long_description:
Nexus is a local metabrain for AI-assisted development. This MCPB extension exposes the Nexus knowledge graph as 29 native MCP tools so any Claude Desktop instance can call nexus_brief at session start, nexus_check_guard before starting work, nexus_push_thought before context-switching, nexus_pop_thought when returning from interruption, and nexus_read_handover / nexus_update_handover for the continuous per-project handover card — turning the Ledger into ambient memory shared across all concurrent sessions.

Runs standalone (NEXUS_STANDALONE=1) — no external server required. Data stored at ~/.nexus/nexus.json. Optionally connects to the Nexus dashboard at http://localhost:3001 if running (cd C:/Projects/Nexus && npm run dashboard).

nexus_base_url.title: Nexus Server URL
nexus_base_url.description: URL of your local Nexus HTTP server. Default works for the standard `npm run dev:server` setup.

tools.name: nexus_brief
tools.description: Get the current Nexus state for a project: fuel, active tasks, recent sessions, key decisions, and risks. Call this at the start of any session to load the metabrain context.

tools.name: nexus_get_plan
tools.description: Get an AI-generated session plan combining current fuel, active tasks, and the knowledge graph. Returns focus, prioritized tasks with time estimates, rationale, and what to avoid.

tools.name: nexus_check_guard
tools.description: Check whether a proposed task or decision is redundant. Returns similar tasks/decisions/sessions with similarity scores. Use BEFORE starting non-trivial work.

tools.name: nexus_record_decision
tools.description: Record a strategic decision into The Ledger (long-term decision graph). For architectural choices, design decisions, scope boundaries.

tools.name: nexus_update_decision
tools.description: Update an existing decision in The Ledger — refine text, context, tags, or project without breaking graph edges.

tools.name: nexus_push_thought
tools.description: Push a thought onto the LIFO Thought Stack — interrupt-recovery working memory. Call BEFORE switching context, getting interrupted, or stopping mid-task.

tools.name: nexus_pop_thought
tools.description: Pop the top thought off the Thought Stack — call when returning from an interruption to recover what you were doing.

tools.name: nexus_log_usage
tools.description: Log a Claude fuel reading (session% remaining, weekly% remaining). Call whenever the user reports a new fuel state. Optionally pass reset_in_minutes to (re)start the session timing window.

tools.name: nexus_create_task
tools.description: Create a new task on the Mission Board. Defaults to backlog status. Use when the user describes something that should be tracked as a discrete work unit.

tools.name: nexus_complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as done by id. Use when work on a task finishes during the conversation.

tools.name: nexus_delete_task
tools.description: Permanently delete a task by id. Use for throwaway / smoke-test / duplicate tasks that shouldn't live in the metabrain. Prefer nexus_complete_task for real work.

tools.name: nexus_log_activity
tools.description: Log an activity entry into the live activity stream. For notable events that aren't full-fledged tasks or sessions (deploys, fixes, calibrations).

tools.name: nexus_log_session
tools.description: Log a session summary with decisions, blockers, tags, files_touched. The memory-bridge operation — call at the end of meaningful work.

tools.name: nexus_link_decisions
tools.description: Create a typed edge between two existing decisions in The Ledger (led_to / depends_on / contradicts / replaced / related). Feeds blast-radius and centrality analysis.

tools.name: nexus_search
tools.description: Smart hybrid (keyword + semantic) search across tasks, sessions, decisions, and activity. Use when the user references prior work vaguely.

tools.name: nexus_get_critique
tools.description: Get self-critique: which tasks took unusually long, which are stuck, which categories are slow, and any patterns detected.

tools.name: nexus_predict_gaps
tools.description: Detect structural gaps in the knowledge graph: blind spots, orphans, unvalidated decisions, stale entries, blockers, uncommitted drift.

tools.name: nexus_get_blast_radius
tools.description: Get the downstream impact of a decision — what gets affected if it changes. Use before proposing changes to architectural decisions.

tools.name: nexus_ask_overseer
tools.description: Ask the Overseer (local AI with full Nexus metabrain context) a strategic question. Slower than other tools but has full context loaded. If this times out, use nexus_ask_overseer_start + nexus_get_overseer_result instead.

tools.name: nexus_ask_overseer_start
tools.description: Start an async Overseer query — returns taskId immediately (no timeout risk). Poll with nexus_get_overseer_result.

tools.name: nexus_get_overseer_result
tools.description: Poll for the result of an async Overseer query. Returns pending/done/error status.

tools.name: nexus_bridge_session
tools.description: Composite end-of-work ritual: generates AI session summary + pushes a handoff thought + returns a handoff note. Turns shutdown into one reflex.

tools.name: nexus_fleet_overview
tools.description: Cross-project priority matrix: ranks ALL open tasks across ALL projects by priority × age × staleness. Use when multiple projects compete for attention.

tools.name: nexus_calendar_runway
tools.description: Classifies upcoming calendar events against current fuel runway (comfortable / tight / wrap_now / unreachable). Pair with a Calendar MCP tool to fetch the events.

tools.name: nexus_propose_edges
tools.description: Overseer-powered knowledge-graph edge suggestions for a decision. Returns a taskId; poll nexus_get_overseer_result, then commit chosen edges via nexus_link_decisions.

tools.name: nexus_version
tools.description: Return the running Nexus server version, mode, applied migrations, tool count, uptime, and overseer availability. Use after an MCPB update or Claude Desktop restart to confirm which build is serving.

tools.name: nexus_import_cc_memories
tools.description: Import Claude Code's auto-memory files (~/.claude/projects/*/memory/*.md) as lifecycle='reference' decisions in the Ledger. Idempotent via file-path dedup. Supports dry_run, force, and project filter. v4.3.8 #200.

tools.name: nexus_read_handover
tools.description: Read the continuous handover card for a project (defaults to Nexus). v4.6.0 #398 — replaces dated HANDOVER-YYYY-MM-DD.md files with a live per-project markdown card stored in the metabrain.

tools.name: nexus_update_handover
tools.description: Write or replace the continuous handover card for a project. Call before docking; next instance reads on session start. ~500-word soft cap. v4.6.0 #398.
